KKT-HardNet
  • Package
  • Entities
  • Edit on GitHub

Entities

In the package workflow, entities are the symbols that appear in a problem definition.

Parameters and Variables

  • Parameters are registered with kkthn.builder.KKTHardNet.add_parameter().

  • Variables are registered with kkthn.builder.KKTHardNet.add_variable().

  • Access is expression-based, for example x.x1 or y.y2.

  • Full vectors are available with x.vector() and y.vector().

Inverse Parameters

Inverse parameters are registered with kkthn.builder.KKTHardNet.add_inverse_parameter() and are learned during estimate().

Constants and Extracted Arrays

Constants are registered with kkthn.builder.KKTHardNet.matrix(), kkthn.builder.KKTHardNet.vector(), and kkthn.builder.KKTHardNet.tensor(). A .npz file can be loaded with kkthn.builder.KKTHardNet.extract(); each array is then available as an attribute on the model.
